$comment: Image slots for AI-generated artwork. Each slot maps to a file in public/images/. Slots set to null render with the design system's pattern/color fallbacks until an image is provided.

provenance.note: Editorial location photography per the style guidelines below; full-resolution PNG sources live in asset-sources/. og-image.jpg is a 1200x630 center crop of hero.jpg. tiles/star-*.webp are individual glazed tesserae cut from one photographed sheet (asset-sources/tesserae-sheet-v1.png, alpha via Higgsfield background removal) — used by the landing intro to lay a real zellij wall.

subjects.hero: Marrakech medina rooftops at dusk, Koutoubia minaret, Atlas mountains (16:9)
subjects.city-casablanca: Hassan II Mosque at blue hour over the Atlantic (3:4)
subjects.city-rabat: Kasbah of the Udayas blue-and-white lane (3:4)
subjects.rail-alboraq: Al Boraq high-speed train at a station platform at dawn (16:9)
subjects.night-taxi: Petit taxi under a street lamp at night (3:4)
subjects.tram-casablanca: Casablanca tram on a palm-lined boulevard at golden hour (16:9)

guidelines.style: Warm, editorial photography or illustration. Zellige green (#0E5A4E), terracotta (#C4502F), sand (#F1E8D8) palette. No stock-photo clichés, no camels-at-sunset.
guidelines.hero: Medina alley with light falling across plaster walls, or a calm overhead of a tiled courtyard.
guidelines.city-*: One distinctive, non-obvious visual per city (Marrakech: derb doorway; Casablanca: tram + art deco; Rabat: Oudayas blue-white lane).
